_comment: Alignment config for W45 building (Vectorworks IFC4). North facade balconies face camera (side without staircase).

north_facade._comment: North facade with balconies (no staircase) faces camera at 0° rotation.

building_transform._comment: No rotation — north facade (balconies, no staircase) faces camera. Front face (bbox.max.z) placed at Z=0.
